24.reason: This loop only checks previous segments in input order, missing connections that involve later segments. It cannot build a chain that requires merging non-sequential indices.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  This loop only checks previous segments in input order, missing connections that involve later segments. It cannot build a chain that requires merging non-sequential indices.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Logical error: A single pass over the array is insufficient. If segments are not provided in topological chain order, connections may be missed or incorrectly merged. Multiple passes or a graph-based traversal is required.]
